title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LUZON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LUZON, MUNICIPALITY OF CABATUAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO SEVERO MACUGAY-LUZON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 27842

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7612, June 13, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LUZON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY LUZON, MUNICIPALITY OF CABATUAN, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO SEVERO MACUGAY-LUZON ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Luzon Elementary School situated in Barangay Luzon, Municipality of Cabatuan, Province of Isabela, is hereby changed to Severo Macugay-Luzon Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 23, 1991 and February 7, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: June 13 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
